description: GO term hierarchy and evidence flow diagram for CG4860 GO:0016937 annotation assessment
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(16, 7))

# Panel A: GO Term Hierarchy with CG4860 annotations highlighted
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 12)
ax1.axis('off')
ax1.set_title('GO Term Hierarchy for\nAcyl-CoA Dehydrogenase Activity', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# Draw boxes
def draw_box(ax, x, y, w, h, text, color, border_color='black', border_width=1):
    rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((x, y), w, h, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", 
                                     facecolor=color, edgecolor=border_color, linewidth=border_width)
    ax.add_patch(rect)
    ax.text(x + w/2, y + h/2, text, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, wrap=True)

# Root
draw_box(ax1, 2, 10.5, 6, 0.8, 'GO:0003995\nacyl-CoA dehydrogenase activity\n(ISS:FlyBase via ACAD11)', '#90EE90', border_width=2)

# Children of GO:0003995
draw_box(ax1, 0.2, 8, 3.5, 0.8, 'GO:0016937\nshort-chain fatty acyl-CoA\ndehydrogenase (IBA, IEA)', '#FFD700', border_color='red', border_width=3)
draw_box(ax1, 4.2, 8, 2.5, 0.8, 'GO:0070991\nmedium-chain fatty\nacyl-CoA DH', '#D3D3D3')
draw_box(ax1, 7, 8, 2.8, 0.8, 'GO:0004466\nlong-chain fatty\nacyl-CoA DH', '#D3D3D3')

# Children of GO:0016937
draw_box(ax1, 0, 5.5, 2, 0.8, 'GO:0008470\n3-methylbutanoyl-CoA\nDH (IVD)', '#ADD8E6')
draw_box(ax1, 2.2, 5.5, 2.2, 0.8, 'GO:0003853\nshort-chain 2-methyl\nfatty acyl-CoA DH', '#ADD8E6')

# Draw connecting lines
ax1.plot([5, 5], [10.5, 9.5], 'k-', linewidth=1)
ax1.plot([1.95, 5.45, 8.4], [9.5, 9.5, 9.5], 'k-', linewidth=1)
ax1.plot([1.95, 1.95], [9.5, 8.8], 'k-', linewidth=1)
ax1.plot([5.45, 5.45], [9.5, 8.8], 'k-', linewidth=1)
ax1.plot([8.4, 8.4], [9.5, 8.8], 'k-', linewidth=1)

ax1.plot([1.95, 1.95], [8, 7.2], 'k-', linewidth=1)
ax1.plot([1, 3.3], [7.2, 7.2], 'k-', linewidth=1)
ax1.plot([1, 1], [7.2, 6.3], 'k-', linewidth=1)
ax1.plot([3.3, 3.3], [7.2, 6.3], 'k-', linewidth=1)

# Annotations
ax1.text(5, 4.5, 'CG4860 annotations:', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(5, 3.8, '• GO:0003995 (ISS:FlyBase) ✓ Well supported', fontsize=8, color='green')
ax1.text(5, 3.2, '• GO:0016937 (IBA:GO_Central) ⚠ Over-specific?', fontsize=8, color='darkorange')
ax1.text(5, 2.6, '• GO:0016937 (IEA:UniProt) ⚠ From EC:1.3.8.1', fontsize=8, color='darkorange')
ax1.text(5, 1.8, 'Key evidence:', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(5, 1.2, '• CG4860 LOF ≠ SCAD phenotype (PMID:40519079)', fontsize=8, color='red')
ax1.text(5, 0.6, '• Arc42 LOF = SCAD phenotype ✓', fontsize=8, color='green')

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#90EE90', edgecolor='black', label='Well-supported annotation'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FFD700', edgecolor='red', linewidth=2, label='Annotation under review'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#ADD8E6', edgecolor='black', label='Child terms (not annotated)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#D3D3D3', edgecolor='black', label='Sibling terms (not annotated)')
]
ax1.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower left', fontsize=7)

# Panel B: Evidence flow diagram
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax2.set_ylim(0, 12)
ax2.axis('off')
ax2.set_title('Evidence Sources for GO:0016937\nAnnotation on CG4860', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# Evidence sources
y_pos = 11
items = [
    ('PANTHER PAINT (IBA)', 'Phylogenetic inference\nPTN000097838 → P16219, Q3ZBF6', '#FFD700', 'Propagated from\ncharacterized ACADS'),
    ('UniProt IEA', 'EC:1.3.8.1 mapping', '#FFD700', 'Automatic from\nEC assignment'),
    ('FlyBase ISS', 'Ref: Q709F0 (ACAD11!)\nPMID:22758915', '#FFA07A', 'Only GO:0003995\n(general ACAD)'),
    ('Sequence analysis', '57.1% identity to HsACADS\nConserved catalytic Glu', '#90EE90', 'Supports SCAD\nsubfamily membership'),
    ('PMID:40519079', 'CG4860 LOF ≠ ACADS phenotype\nArc42 LOF = ACADS phenotype', '#FF6B6B', 'Challenges in vivo\nSCAD function'),
    ('Substrate pocket', 'Leu→Thr at RIGIA+8\nAltered pocket shape', '#FFD700', 'May explain\ndifferent specificity'),
]

for i, (source, detail, color, implication) in enumerate(items):
    y = 11 - i * 1.8
    # Source box
    draw_box(ax2, 0.2, y-0.3, 2.5, 0.7, source, color)
    # Detail
    ax2.text(3, y, detail, fontsize=7, va='center')
    # Arrow
    ax2.annotate('', xy=(7, y), xytext=(6.2, y),
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray'))
    # Implication
    ax2.text(7.2, y, implication, fontsize=7, va='center', style='italic')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('go_hierarchy_evidence.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved")
